paper_title: Provenance study on Eocene–Miocene sandstones of the Rakhine Coastal Belt, Indo-Burman Ranges of Myanmar: geodynamic implications

methods.description: Modal framework grain analysis of sandstones was performed to classify the sandstones and interpret the geodynamic setting of the source terranes.

steps.description: Modal framework grain analysis of the sandstones was performed on thin sections stained for feldspars and carbonates.
steps.searchable_summary: perform modal framework grain analysis on stained thin sections

steps.description: Monomineralic grains (quartz and feldspars) and lithic rock fragments were distinguished according to the standard method.
steps.searchable_summary: distinguish monomineralic grains and lithic fragments

steps.description: At least 300 grains were point-counted in the feldspar-stained thin sections.
steps.searchable_summary: point-count at least 300 grains in thin sections

steps.description: The percentages of various combinations of grains are plotted in standard triangular diagrams.
steps.searchable_summary: plot grain percentages in triangular diagrams

methods.description: Process to extract and analyze heavy mineral fractions from sandstones for provenance analysis.

steps.description: Sandstones were crushed using high voltage pulse power technology to liberate morphologically intact minerals.
steps.searchable_summary: crush sandstones using high voltage pulse power

steps.description: Carbonate was dissolved in warm 10% acetic acid.
steps.searchable_summary: dissolve carbonate in warm acetic acid

steps.description: Heavy minerals were extracted using bromoform in separation funnels.
Mineral identification and quantification was carried out under the petrographic microscope.
steps.searchable_summary: identify and quantify minerals under microscope

methods.description: Extraction and analysis of detrital zircons for isotopic and typological studies.

steps.description: Detrital zircons were extracted using standard mineral separation techniques.
steps.searchable_summary: extract detrital zircons using standard techniques

steps.description: Handpicked zircons were mounted in epoxy blocks and polished.
steps.searchable_summary: mount and polish zircons in epoxy blocks

steps.description: Cathodoluminescence imaging was carried out to determine internal structures.
Laser ablation ICP-MS U-Pb dating was performed on magmatic domains.
steps.searchable_summary: perform U-Pb dating using laser ablation ICP-MS

steps.description: In-situ Hf isotopic analysis was carried out using MC-ICP-MS.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Hf isotopic analysis using MC-ICP-MS
